phase_prompt_templates.stand_off: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: move the gripper to a safe stand-off pose near the {piece}, keeping the jaws open.
phase_prompt_templates.advance: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: approach the grasp point on the {piece}, keeping the jaws open.
phase_prompt_templates.close: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: close the gripper around the {piece} and establish a secure grasp.
phase_prompt_templates.lift: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: lift the grasped {piece} straight upward while keeping the jaws closed.
phase_prompt_templates.transit: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: carry the grasped {piece} above {target_square}, keeping it lifted and the jaws closed.
phase_prompt_templates.lower: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: lower the grasped {piece} upright onto {target_square}, keeping the jaws closed.
phase_prompt_templates.release: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: open the gripper to release the {piece} on {target_square}.
phase_prompt_templates.retreat: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: move the open gripper safely away from the released {piece}.
phase_prompt_templates.settle: Pick up the {piece} from {source_square} and place it on {target_square}. Current subtask: keep the open gripper clear while the {piece} settles upright on {target_square}.
